impact: The worker is blocked by an import-time Python 3.12 dataclasses failure under the syntax-first import guard, before validator behavior is reached. This updates daemon task selection so the next autonomous cycle keeps prior sentinel and fixture prerequisites, avoids dataclasses entirely, and retries only the minimal one-file validator implementation.
summary: Park the dataclass-based public source inventory retry and append a narrower no-dataclass recovery task.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-67: Add the public source inventory validator only after the syntax-first import test and one-unsafe-field fixture pass, covering allowlisted hosts, private DevHub paths, raw response bodies, downloaded documents, credentials, traces, screenshots, and required provenance fields.; Task checkbox-68: Restore the public source inventory syntax sentinel only: replace `ppd/contracts/public_source_inventory.py` as needed to preserve `MODULE_PURPOSE` and existing import-guard expectations before any validator behavior changes.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
